Meet Our Team

Experienced professionals dedicated to your success

SO

Sarah Okonkwo

Managing Director, FCCA

Sarah founded Greymatter Accountancy with a vision to bring intelligent, responsive accounting to London's growing businesses. With 15+ years in practice, she has led audit teams for companies ranging from ambitious startups to established City firms. Her expertise spans financial reporting, audit strategy, and commercial advisory for growth-stage businesses.

Expertise:

Financial Reporting Audit Strategy Business Advisory Fundraising Support FCCA Member
JV

James Varghese

Audit & Assurance Lead

James brings Big 4 experience to Greymatter's audit practice. After 8 years at a leading audit firm, he joined to focus on mid-market and growth clients where his expertise could make a real difference. He specializes in complex audit structures, internal controls evaluation, and working with high-growth companies navigating scale.

Expertise:

Statutory Audit Internal Controls Complex Structures ISA (UK) Standards FCA Compliance
ER

Elena Rossi

Tax & Compliance Specialist, CTA

Elena is our tax strategist, bringing CTA qualification and deep expertise in UK tax planning. She's helped 100+ clients optimize their tax position, from startup R&D relief strategies to complex corporation tax restructuring. Elena stays ahead of HMRC rule changes and actively advises clients on tax-efficient structures.

Expertise:

Corporation Tax R&D Relief VAT Strategy Tax Planning CTA Qualified

Supporting Team

Beyond our partners, we have a dedicated team of senior bookkeepers, tax consultants, and audit associates supporting our clients daily.

8+

Senior Associates

500+

Active Clients

£50M+

15+

Years Experience

Our Culture

We believe great accounting comes from great people working in an environment that values:

Collaboration

We work together, sharing expertise and supporting each client with our full team's knowledge.

Continuous Learning

Tax and accounting constantly evolve. We invest in professional development and stay ahead of changes.

Client Focus

Every decision is made with our clients' success in mind. Your goals are our goals.

Innovation

We embrace technology, automation, and better processes to serve you more effectively.

Ready to Work with Our Team?

Let's connect with the right specialist for your accounting needs.
